0.text: Centriacinar pulmonary nodules of ground glass density in both lungs, particularly in the upper lobe of the right lung

1.text: Interlobular septal thickening in the lower lobe of the left lung and the lower lobes of the right lung

2.text: Minimal pleural effusion in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Atelectasis in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe
